IronVale Resources / ASX:IVR
Home About Operations Careers Contact Apply

About IronVale

A Western Australian story, still being written.

Founded in 2009 as a single-pit operation in the Pilbara. Three sites, 180 people, and a board that picks its bets carefully.

Profile

Who we are.

A mid-tier iron ore and lithium mining company operating two active mine sites in the Pilbara and one lithium project in the Goldfields-Esperance region. Headquartered in Perth with FIFO workforce rotating to site. Known for strong safety culture, community engagement with Traditional Owners, and early adoption of autonomous mining technologies.
01

2 active iron ore mines (Pilbara)

02

1 lithium project in development (Goldfields-Esperance)

03

Annual iron ore production: 8Mt

04

Lost Time Injury Frequency Rate: 0.8 (industry-leading)

05

120 FIFO workforce + 60 Perth office staff

06

Heritage agreements with 3 Traditional Owner groups

Country

Acknowledgement.

IronVale Resources operates on the lands of the Nyiyaparli, Banyjima, and Martu peoples in the Pilbara, and the Wongatha people in the Goldfields-Esperance region. We acknowledge their continuing connection to country and culture, and we pay respect to Elders past and present.

Heritage agreements aren't a checklist for us. They're relationships we maintain over years, and our Sustainability and People teams work closely with Traditional Owner groups before any new ground is disturbed.

Leadership

The people in charge.

A small executive bench by industry standards. That's deliberate — fewer layers, faster calls.

01 / EXEC

Karen Whitfield

Chief Operating Officer

02 / EXEC

Tom Gallagher

Chief Financial Officer

Want to know what we're up to?

The current chapter is the lithium transition. Read about our operations, or jump straight to careers.

Operations

IronVale

Mid-tier Western Australian producer of iron ore and critical minerals. Headquartered in Perth, operating across the Pilbara and Goldfields-Esperance regions.
